gamerule.spawnBunkerStartingHeight.descr: The height at which the spawn bunker is generated at. Requires Bunker Spawning on to work. Do NOT set this at height limits, or above ground, unless you know what you're doing.
gamerule.underrootGrowableHeight.descrip: The maximum height that the Underroot plant can spawn or be planted at.
